title: Observational Sketches
content: Pencil sketches from observational drawing sessions — people in casual poses, a classmate at work, dogs and other animals drawn from life. All black and white, all done from direct observation.

images.caption: Focused Individual at Work: A classmate bent over their work, sketched from across the room.
Studies of Human Figures: Quick studies of people in casual poses — seated, standing, leaning. Drawn from observation, minimal detail.
Dog Portraits and Postures: A few sketches of the same dog — frontal portrait and a couple of resting poses.
Diverse Animal Studies: Rodents, rabbits, birds, monkeys, dogs — each drawn in whatever pose they happened to be in.
